title: Search function isn't enough highlighted and doesn't show everything
excerpt:
When I search a word in my board, it’s very weak highlighted. It would be very easier to find, if it would glow yellow or such other glowing colour. 
An if the searched word is in the long text field, it even doesn’t sho…

posts.author: stefan.philipp (Stefan Philipp)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I search a word in my board, it’s very weak highlighted. It would be very easier to find, if it would glow yellow or such other glowing colour.

An if the searched word is in the long text field, it even doesn’t show up!!!

posts.author: pettravel (Susan Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Search function is very weak. Rarely pulls clients via their names, full names, first names, last names or partial names. This can be an issue on larger boards with multiple parent lines.
